robloxstudio.description: boshyxd robloxstudio-mcp — 43 tools (inspection + mutation), pairs with the robloxstudio-mcp studio plugin from https://github.com/boshyxd/robloxstudio-mcp/releases

roblox-studio.description: official roblox studio mcp — stdio transport, paired with its own studio plugin. kept alongside robloxstudio because buddy-map-generator currently shells out to it for run_code

buddy-map-generator.description: high-level mcp that scaffolds the buddy bridge studio map by emitting lua and shipping it through roblox-studio's run_code
